metadata.description: OloLand's plugin marketplace for Claude Code and Claude Cowork. Institutional buy-side underwriting depth on top of Anthropic's finance plugin lineup: deterministic financial engines, 246-category risk taxonomy, forensic QoE primitives, cross-deal learning, and the compliance hooks Anthropic's vertical plugins ship empty.

plugins.name: ololand-dd
plugins.description: Institutional due diligence for Claude — deterministic DCF / LBO / Monte Carlo / Real Options engines, 246-category risk taxonomy with SaaS / healthcare / real-estate / industrial overlays, forensic QoE primitives, cross-document reconciliation (CPA > tax > management > AI), MaskablePPO war-game simulation, assumption controls that gate IC approval, analytical workbench tools for QoE/compliance/scenarios/earnings, verified forensic screen marketplace support, and a regulator-grade audit trail with replay and compliance-framework exports. Three sub-agents (dd-analyst, forensic-screener, war-game-strategist) plus a flywheel that retrains from analyst corrections. Counter-positions Anthropic's native private-equity plugin.

plugins.name: ololand-compliance-hooks
plugins.description: Drop-in compliance, citation, and provenance hooks for Anthropic's Claude Cowork finance plugins. PreToolUse MNPI guard, PostToolUse citation enforcer, audit-log writeback, tier-capacity warning, and evidence-quality warning for OloLand's IC approval gate. Populates the empty hooks/ scaffold Anthropic's finance verticals ship with.

plugins.name: ololand-forensic-qoe
plugins.description: Forensic Quality-of-Earnings primitives as a standalone plugin: Beneish M-Score, Benford's Law, EBITDA bridge, journal-entry testing, lapping detection, working-capital deep dive, and covenant-cascade analysis (cross-default chain modeling). The Pre-LOI Forensic Screen wedge — $99 / 72-hour SLA, IC-defensible, with Full QoE at $999, vs Big-4 QoE at $150-500K / 4-8 weeks.
